description: Trendline color must match setup state: orange=ready, green/red=breakout, blue=developing-only

assertions.description: Check trendline color matches label state. If a LONG|* setup label is visible, the trendline must be green (breakout confirmed). If no label but trendline visible, it may be orange (ready, span met) or blue (developing). A blue trendline must NOT appear alongside a setup label.
